cnbc.summary: The Trump administration has ramped its tariff actions back up since the president's trade  agenda suffered major legal setbacks earlier this year.

cnbc.summary: Intel rallied after the company reported blowout earnings and guidance.

cnbc.title: Oracle signs 10-year software contract with Pentagon worth up to $7 billion
cnbc.summary: Oracle will supply on-premises software to the U.S. Department of Defense.

cnbc.title: Japan core inflation rate in June creeps up from 4-year low as higher oil prices bite
cnbc.summary: This is the first rise in core inflation since March, and was in line with the1.6% growth expected by economists polled by Reuters.

cnbc.title: Shortsighted stock market can no longer brush off war: 'It's too hard to ignore $100 oil'
cnbc.summary: After staying flat as the U.S.-Iran war heated up again, equities tumbled on Thursday after oil prices crossed $100 per barrel.

cnbc.title: OpenAI's Hugging Face hack triggers 'AI Kill Switch' bill in Congress
cnbc.summary: OpenAI disclosed this week that some of its AI models went rogue and hacked into open-source developer platform Hugging Face.

cnbc.title: Tesla, Alphabet lose hundreds of billions in value in post-earnings stock plunge
cnbc.summary: Both Tesla and Alphabet signaled higher spending as they invest in artificial intelligence.

cnbc.title: Amazon and Microsoft pivot cloud gaming strategies to target different players
cnbc.summary: Amazon is bringing Luna to the Prime Video streaming service, while Microsoft will test an ad-supported streaming of titles that people own.

cnbc.title: 10-year Treasury yield rises to highest since January 2025 as surging oil rekindles inflation fear
cnbc.summary: U.S. Treasury yields climbed on Wednesday, following oil prices higher, as traders also reacted to a slump in weekly claims for unemployment insurance.

cnbc.title: As Honda CR-V leads U.S. sales, automaker teases new American-built pickup truck
cnbc.summary: The future of the Ridgeline midsize pickup truck had been in flux, and the automaker said there will be a temporary production stoppage for the truck.
